# KR1 – Registrar todas novas demandas no GitHub Project

## Descrição
Este KR visa garantir que todas as novas demandas sejam registradas via
Issue e vinculadas ao GitHub Project para rastreabilidade e mensuração.

### Entregável
- Lista de novas Issues padronizadas
- Link das Issues no GitHub Project

### Critérios de aceite
- Todas as novas demandas criadas como Issue
- Issue vinculada a Project correto
- Responsável e status preenchidos
- Labels OKR aplicados

### Labels
- okr:  
  [KR1]{.tag-blue}
- responsável:  
  [Walace]{.tag-red}
- status:  
  [Backlog]{.tag-blue}

### Milestone
Março 2026





```{=html}
<svg width="800" height="500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f9f9f9"/>

  <!-- KR1 Box -->
  <rect x="20" y="20" width="200" height="120" fill="#cce5ff" stroke="#3399ff" stroke-width="2" rx="10"/>
  <text x="30" y="45" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" font-weight="bold">KR1</text>
  <text x="30" y="70" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">Registrar novas demandas</text>
  <text x="30" y="90" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">Entregáveis:</text>
  <text x="40" y="105" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Lista de Issues</text>
  <text x="40" y="120" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Links no Project</text>

  <!-- Arrow KR1 -> Issue -->
  <line x1="220" y1="80" x2="300" y2="80" stroke="#3399ff" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>

  <!-- Issue Box -->
  <rect x="300" y="40" width="200" height="100" fill="#d4edda" stroke="#28a745" stroke-width="2" rx="10"/>
  <text x="310" y="60" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" font-weight="bold">GitHub Issue</text>
  <text x="310" y="85" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Contém KR</text>
  <text x="310" y="100" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Lista de entregáveis</text>
  <text x="310" y="115" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Labels e responsável</text>

  <!-- Arrow Issue -> PR -->
  <line x1="500" y1="90" x2="600" y2="90" stroke="#28a745" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>

  <!-- PR Box -->
  <rect x="600" y="60" width="150" height="60" fill="#fff3cd" stroke="#ffc107" stroke-width="2" rx="10"/>
  <text x="610" y="80" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold">Pull Request</text>
  <text x="610" y="95" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Referencia Issue</text>

  <!-- Arrow Issue -> Project -->
  <line x1="400" y1="140" x2="400" y2="200" stroke="#6c757d" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>

  <!-- Project Box -->
  <rect x="300" y="200" width="200" height="80" fill="#e2e3e5" stroke="#6c757d" stroke-width="2" rx="10"/>
  <text x="310" y="225" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" font-weight="bold">GitHub Project</text>
  <text x="310" y="245" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Status de fluxo</text>
  <text x="310" y="260" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Métricas / KRs</text>

  <!-- Arrow Project -> Wiki -->
  <line x1="400" y1="280" x2="400" y2="340" stroke="#17a2b8" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>

  <!-- Wiki Box -->
  <rect x="300" y="340" width="200" height="80" fill="#d1ecf1" stroke="#17a2b8" stroke-width="2" rx="10"/>
  <text x="310" y="365" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" font-weight="bold">GitHub Wiki</text>
  <text x="310" y="385" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- OKRs estratégicos e táticos</text>
  <text x="310" y="400" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">- Fluxo e boas práticas</text>

  <!-- Arrowhead definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" 
            refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#333"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

</svg>
```
